## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is missing or hard today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you rejected them.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps explain the request (mockups, related issues, the part
of the hierarchy it affects: Solution / Project / Milestone / Task / Comment).
